title: Delhi High Court protects Shashi Tharoor's personality rights, blocks deepfakes praising Pakistan
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday protected the personality rights of Congress Member of Parliament (MP) Shashi Tharoor.Justice Mini Pushkarna restrained the misappropriation, reproduction or imitation of Tharoor's name, visual likeness, image, voice, "signature oratorial cadence", manner of speaking and "highly refined vocabulary" to create any deepfakes, morphed videos or audio. The Court also directed Meta and X to remove and block deepfake videos of Tharoor allegedly praising the Pakistani fore
